text: Tired of sleeping on the floor,
zh: 一个住在德黑兰的年轻人厌倦了睡地板,

text: a young man in Teheran saved up for years to buy a real bed.
zh: 攒钱好几年,终于买了一张真正的床。

text: For the first time in his life,
he became the proud owner of a bed which had springs and a mattress.
zh: 拥有了一张带弹簧和床垫的床,感到无比自豪。

text: Because the weather was very hot,
he carried the bed on to the roof of his house.
zh: 他把床搬到了自己家的屋顶上。

text: He slept very well for the first two nights,
but on the third night, a storm blew up.
zh: 可是到了第三晚,忽然刮起了暴风。

text: A gust of wind swept the bed off the roof and sent it crashing into the courtyard below.
zh: 一阵狂风把床从屋顶上刮了下来,重重摔进了下面的院子里。

text: The young man did not wake up
zh: 这个年轻人一直没有醒来,

text: until the bed had struck the ground.
zh: 直到床砸到地面上才惊醒。

text: Although the bed was smashed to pieces,

zh: 他却奇迹般地毫发无伤。

text: When he woke up, he was still on the mattress.
zh: 他醒来时,发现自己仍躺在床垫上。

text: Glancing at the bits of wood and metal that lay around him,
zh: 看着散落在四周的木片和金属碎片,

text: the man sadly picked up the mattress and carried it into his house.
zh: 他伤心地捡起床垫,搬回了屋里。

text: After he had put it on the floor,
he promptly went to sleep again.
